message:
fix: remove 'c' from ALL_LANGS to prevent doctor 404 on nonexistent ubs-c.sh module

The ALL_LANGS array included 'c' as a separate entry, but there is no
ubs-c.sh module — C files are handled by the cpp module (ubs-cpp.sh).
The normalize_lang() function already maps 'c' → 'cpp' at scan time,
but the doctor command's module download loop doesn't use
normalize_lang(), causing a 404 when trying to download ubs-c.sh.

Fixes #34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -278,7 +278,7 @@ SESSION_RAW=0
 SESSION_LOG_DIR_OVERRIDE=""
 VERIFY_MODULE_ERR=""
 VERIFY_HELPER_ERR=""
-ALL_LANGS=(js python c cpp rust golang java ruby swift csharp)
+ALL_LANGS=(js python cpp rust golang java ruby swift csharp)
 UPDATE_ONLY=0
 FORCE_SELF_UPDATE=0
 CATEGORY_FILTER=""
